steps.title: Identify the equation of the line
steps.content: From the graph, determine the slope and y-intercept of the line to write its equation.\[y = mx + b\]

steps.title: Substitute the coordinates (7, c) into the equation
steps.content:
The point \((7, c)\) lies on this line, so it must satisfy its equation. Substitute $x = 7$ and solve for $c$: $$c = 7 - 1$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
